This app allows you to stream for a twen:
This app allows you to stream for a twenty-minute free trial.
            After twenty minutes, the stream will disconnect.
            Please use the twenty-minute trail to verify that the app is compatible on your device.
If you like the app want to purchase the:
If you like the app want to purchase the full version, download the XBPlay app on your Android or iOS device and buy the full version.
            Your license will carry over to this app. Alternatively, you can buy the XBPlay app on Steam.
On your phone, scan the QR code or searc: On your phone, scan the QR code or search the iOS App Store or Google Play for the XBPlay app and download it.
Open the mobile app and sign-in to your: Open the mobile app and sign-in to your Microsoft account.
Click the settings button, then click 'U: Click the settings button, then click 'Unlock Full Version' to purchase the app.
That's it! After you log in and restart: That's it! After you log in and restart this app the full version will be available.
Open the Steam store and search for the: Open the Steam store and search for the XBPlay app and install it.
Ensure you don't have the 'Steam Deck Ve: Ensure you don't have the 'Steam Deck Verified' checkbox toggled when searching. While this app does support Steam Decks, its not Steam Deck verified yet.
If the app ever fails to open from Steam: If the app ever fails to open from Steam, ensure you do not have 'Proton Compatibility' enabled.
Must restart app for GPU mode to change. Only applies if you have multiple GPUs.
Must restart app to apply change. Only a: Must restart app to apply change. Only applies to linux.
Will re-download and override all xCloud: Will re-download and override all xCloud shortcut artwork. A Steam restart is required to see new artwork.
Login faster by exclusively using either: Login faster by exclusively using either xCloud or xHome. Or use the new Oauth based login method (beta).
Only applicable for Oauth login method. Must press login button after changing to apply. May impact available languages for cloud games.
Cloud will download images from the xClo: Cloud will download images from the xCloud servers, SteamGrid will download the first result from a SteamGrid search.
Choose whether to create an xCloud short: Choose whether to create an xCloud shortcut before launching each xCloud game. Disabling this will remove the option to create xCloud shortcuts.
Automatically maintains the main XBPlay: Automatically maintains the main XBPlay app shortcut in your 'Non Steam Games' library upon each app startup.
Customize individual shortcut settings;: Customize individual shortcut settings; adjusting the resolution for one xCloud shortcut won't impact others, such as setting 720p for Halo without affecting Forza.
Press the Guide button by holding the vi: Press the Guide button by holding the view button (top left) and the menu button (top right) at the same time.
Quit a game with the side menu or by sto: Quit a game with the side menu or by stopping the stream within the Xbox. For example, Guide->Stop Remote Play.
Use F11 or F10 to toggle fullscreen and: Use F11 or F10 to toggle fullscreen and use the top left corner to drag the window.
Add an xCloud shortcuts directly to Stea: Add an xCloud shortcuts directly to Steam by clicking on an xCloud game and pressing 'Add to Steam'
If you don't see the 'Add to Steam' opti: If you don't see the 'Add to Steam' option, ensure the Steam app is running. The status of the Steam app is displayed on the bottom right of the main menu.
Artwork will automatically be added to y: Artwork will automatically be added to your xCloud Steam shortcut.
If your xCloud artwork gets out of sync,: If your xCloud artwork gets out of sync, press the sync button in the settings to redownload and override all xCloud title artwork.
If you see a yellow popup after login, y: If you see a yellow popup after login, you do not have remote features enabled. To enable it, signed into your profile on your Xbox and go to 'Settings > Devices & connections > Remote features' and ensure its checked. If it is already checked, toggle it off/on and click 'Test Remote Play'.
If you have an IPv6 or DualStack router,: If you have an IPv6 or DualStack router, remote play should work from outside of your home network. If you have an IPv4 only router, you must enable port forwarding for port 9002 for both UDP and TCP on your router for your consoles IP address.
Force Vulkan (Reduces latency by ~5ms bu: Force Vulkan (Reduces latency by ~5ms but disables clarity boost)
